coupon.source_phrase_block: Admits two (2) adults at $12.00 per person for general admission. Regular admission rates are $25 for adults, $23 for seniors (age 65+), and $15 for students; children under 16 and all residents of Salem, MA are admitted free. Reserve the pass and you will automatically receive an email containing a unique promo code. Enter the code while purchasing tickets on the Peabody Essex Museum website. This pass is generously sponsored by the Family Friends of the Billerica Public Library.
